title: CLEO Configuration Schema
description: Configuration for archive policies, validation rules, logging, and session behavior.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for this file (semver). Canonical source for schema version (replaces root version field).

oneOf.description: Single config to extend (file path or npm package)
Multiple configs to extend (processed left-to-right, last wins)

extends.description: Configuration inheritance. Supports file paths (~/.cleo/config.json, ../shared/config.json) or npm packages (@cleo/config-ci). Resolution order: global config → extended configs (left-to-right) → project config → environment variables. Deep merge strategy: primitive values last-wins, arrays concatenate with deduplication, objects merge recursively. Circular extends chains MUST be detected and MUST fail with exit code 6 (E_VALIDATION_FAILED).

directories.description: Directory path configuration. Only agentOutputs is consumed; all other sub-fields were vaporware (T109).

agentOutputs.description: DEPRECATED: Use agentOutputs.directory instead. Agent manifest outputs (MANIFEST.jsonl location). Retained as Priority 3 fallback in paths.ts.

enabled.description: Enable automatic archiving of completed tasks.

daysUntilArchive.description: Days after completion before task is eligible for archive.

maxCompletedTasks.description: Max completed tasks in todo.json before triggering archive.

preserveRecentCount.description: Always keep this many recent completed tasks (for context).

archiveOnSessionEnd.description: Run archive check at session end.

autoArchiveOnComplete.description: Automatically archive completed task if eligible (age >= daysUntilArchive).

exemptLabels.description: Labels that exempt tasks from automatic archiving. Add these labels to any task/epic you want to protect from auto-archive.

daysUntilArchive.description: Days after completion before task with this label is eligible for archive.

neverArchive.description: If true, tasks with this label are never automatically archived.

relationshipSafety.description: Safety settings for archiving tasks with relationships.

preventOrphanChildren.description: Don't archive parent tasks with active children.

preventBrokenDependencies.description: Warn before archiving tasks that would break dependency chains.

cascadeArchive.description: Allow cascade archiving of completed children when parent is archived.

phases.description: Phase slugs that trigger archiving when completed.

archivePhaseOnly.description: Only archive tasks from the completed phase (vs all eligible tasks).

interactive.description: Interactive prompts and warnings for archive operations.

confirmBeforeArchive.description: Prompt for confirmation before archiving tasks.

showWarnings.description: Show warnings about relationships and dependencies before archiving.

filePath.description: Log file path relative to .cleo/ directory.

maxFileSize.description: Max log file size in bytes before rotation (default: 10MB).

maxFiles.description: Number of rotated log files to retain.

validation.description: Legacy validation settings. Most fields have been superseded by dedicated enforcement sections. Only deprecated fields retained for backward compatibility with existing config files.

validateDependencies.description: DEPRECATED: dependency validation always runs unconditionally. This flag is never read by the engine. Retained for backward compatibility only.

detectCircularDeps.description: DEPRECATED: circular dependency detection always runs unconditionally. This flag is never read by the engine. Retained for backward compatibility only.

releaseGates.description: DEPRECATED: Use release.gates instead. Validation gates for release operations.

required.description: If true, gate failure blocks release.

verification.description: Verification gates configuration for task quality tracking.

enabled.description: Enable verification gates for task completion. When true, parent auto-complete requires verification.passed = true.

requiredForTypes.description: Task types that require verification gates.

autoInitialize.description: Automatically initialize verification metadata on task creation.

maxRounds.description: Maximum implementation rounds before HITL escalation.

requiredGates.description: Gates required to pass for verification.passed = true. cleanupDone excluded by default.

autoSetImplementedOnComplete.description: Automatically set gates.implemented = true when ct complete runs.

requireForParentAutoComplete.description: Require verification.passed = true for parent auto-complete.

defaults.description: Default values for new tasks. Only priority is consumed (T109).

session.description: Session behavior settings. Only enforcement is consumed from config; other fields were vaporware (T109). Core session behavior uses enforcement.session.requiredForMutate.

enforcement.description: Session enforcement mode for write operations. strict=block without session, warn/advisory=warn but allow, none/off=no enforcement.

output.description: Output formatting and display preferences. Fields are ENV-mapped (CLEO_FORMAT, CLEO_OUTPUT_*) but not consumed by the rendering layer at runtime — format is determined by CLI flags. Fields retained for ENV_MAP wiring only.

defaultFormat.description: Default output format for list and export commands. Mapped from CLEO_FORMAT env var.

showColor.description: Enable ANSI color output. Respects NO_COLOR env var. Mapped from CLEO_OUTPUT_SHOW_COLOR.

showUnicode.description: Use Unicode symbols and box-drawing characters. Mapped from CLEO_OUTPUT_SHOW_UNICODE.

showProgressBars.description: Show progress bars in dashboard and phase views. Mapped from CLEO_OUTPUT_SHOW_PROGRESS_BARS.

dateFormat.description: Date/time display format. Mapped from CLEO_OUTPUT_DATE_FORMAT. NOTE: enum differs from contracts/config.ts DateFormat type — reconcile in follow-up.

backup.description: Backup system configuration for snapshots, safety backups, incremental backups, and archive backups.

directory.description: Directory for storing all backup types (snapshot, safety, incremental, archive, migration).

maxSnapshots.description: Maximum number of snapshot backups to retain (count-based retention).

maxSafetyBackups.description: Maximum number of safety backups to retain (count-based retention, works with safetyRetentionDays).

maxIncremental.description: Maximum number of incremental backups to retain (count-based retention).

maxArchiveBackups.description: Maximum number of archive backups to retain (count-based retention).

safetyRetentionDays.description: Days to retain safety backups (time-based retention, works with maxSafetyBackups).

scheduled.description: Scheduled/automatic backup settings for session events and operations.

onSessionStart.description: Create snapshot backup when session starts.

onSessionEnd.description: Create safety backup when session ends.

onArchive.description: Create safety backup before archive operations.

intervalMinutes.description: Optional interval (minutes) for timed backups. 0 disables interval-based backups. When set, backups are created on CLI invocation if interval has elapsed since last backup.

cancellation.description: DEPRECATED: cancellation behavior is controlled by CLI flags (--children, --reason, --force). None of these fields are read by the engine. Retained for backward compatibility only.

cascadeConfirmThreshold.description: DEPRECATED: not enforced by the engine. Use --force CLI flag to bypass confirmation.

requireReason.description: DEPRECATED: not enforced by the engine. Cancellation reason is optional and passed via --reason CLI flag.

daysUntilArchive.description: DEPRECATED: not enforced by the engine. Cancelled task archiving is handled by the archive section.

allowCascade.description: DEPRECATED: not enforced by the engine. Cascade behavior is controlled by the --children CLI flag.

defaultChildStrategy.description: DEPRECATED: not enforced by the engine. Default child strategy is always 'block'; override with --children CLI flag.

hierarchy.description: Hierarchy constraints for Epic → Task → Subtask structure. LLM-Agent-First design: limits are organizational, not cognitive.

maxSiblings.description: Maximum children per parent (0 = unlimited, recommended for LLM agents). Done tasks excluded by default. See TASK-HIERARCHY-SPEC.md Part 3.2.

maxDepth.description: Maximum hierarchy depth (epic=0, task=1, subtask=2). Rarely needs changing.

countDoneInLimit.description: Whether done tasks count toward maxSiblings. Default false: done tasks are historical record, not active context.

maxActiveSiblings.description: Maximum active (non-done) children per parent. Aligns with TodoWrite sync limit for context management.

storage.description: Storage engine configuration. SQLite is always used unconditionally — this field is declarative intent only and has no behavioral effect (T109).

engine.description: Storage engine declaration. NOTE: SQLite is always used; this field is not read at runtime to select the engine. Declarative only.

analyze.description: Configuration for the analyze command. Only lockAwareness.{enabled,warnOnly} are consumed (T109).

lockAwareness.description: Lock file detection and concurrent operation awareness settings.

enabled.description: Enable lock detection in analyze output.

warnOnly.description: Warn about locks but don't block operations. Set false to block on active locks.

contextAlerts.description: Context window alert configuration. Controls when and how users are alerted about context window usage approaching thresholds.

enabled.description: Enable context window threshold alerts. When false, no alerts are shown.

triggerCommands.description: Commands that trigger context alert checks. Empty array = all commands.

suppressDuration.description: Seconds to suppress repeat alerts at same threshold level. 0 = show on every threshold crossing.

agentOutputs.description: Cross-agent output configuration. Only directory and manifestFile are consumed (T109).

directory.description: Directory for agent outputs relative to project root.

research.description: DEPRECATED: Use agentOutputs instead. Only outputDir and manifestFile are consumed (T109).

outputDir.description: DEPRECATED: Use agentOutputs.directory instead. Directory for research outputs relative to project root.

release.description: Release system configuration including validation gates for pre-release checks.

gates.description: Validation gates executed before release. Each gate is a command that must exit 0 to pass.

command.description: Shell command to execute. Exit 0 = pass, non-zero = fail.

required.description: If true, gate failure blocks release. If false, failure is logged as warning.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this gate validates.

guards.description: Release guard configuration. Controls pre-release safety checks.

epicCompleteness.description: Epic completeness guard mode. 'warn' shows incomplete tasks as warning, 'block' prevents release (use --force to override), 'off' disables check.

versionBump.description: Portable version bump configuration. Defines which files to update when bumping the project version during release.

enabled.description: Enable version bump during release ship --bump-version.

files.description: Files to update with the new version. Each entry defines a file path, update strategy, and strategy-specific options.

path.description: File path relative to project root.

strategy.description: Update strategy. 'plain' overwrites file with version string. 'json' updates a JSON field via jq. 'toml' updates a TOML key via sed. 'sed' applies a custom sed pattern.

jsonPath.description: jq path expression for 'json' strategy (e.g., '.version', '.package.version'). Required when strategy is 'json'.

tomlKey.description: TOML key to update for 'toml' strategy (e.g., 'version', 'package.version'). Required when strategy is 'toml'.

sedPattern.description: Custom sed substitution pattern for 'sed' strategy. Use {{VERSION}} as placeholder for the new version (e.g., 's|version-[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+-|version-{{VERSION}}-|g'). Required when strategy is 'sed'.

sedMatch.description: Grep pattern to verify the sed target exists before applying. Used with 'sed' strategy to fail fast if the pattern is not found.

optional.description: If true, skip this file silently when it does not exist. If false (default), fail with an error.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this file contains (e.g., 'README version badge', 'NPM package version').

preValidate.description: Shell command to run before version bump. Exit 0 = pass. Used to verify current version state is clean.

postValidate.description: Shell command to run after version bump. Exit 0 = pass. Used to verify all files were updated correctly.

autoGenerate.description: Automatically generate changelog from commits and task history.

outputs.description: Output targets for changelog generation. Supports multiple documentation platforms.

platform.description: Documentation platform type. Determines format and transformations applied.

path.description: Output file path relative to project root.

retention.description: Retention policies for session lifecycle management. Only autoEndActiveAfterDays is consumed (T109).

autoEndActiveAfterDays.description: Automatically end active sessions with no activity for this many days. Prevents stale sessions from accumulating.

orchestrator.description: Orchestrator agent configuration. Only contextThresholds.{warning,critical} are consumed (T109).

contextThresholds.description: Context window usage thresholds that trigger orchestrator actions. Values are percentages of context window capacity.

warning.description: Warning threshold (%). At this level, orchestrator should plan to wrap up current work and delegate remaining tasks to subagents.

critical.description: Critical threshold (%). At this level, orchestrator must STOP immediately, pause session, and generate HITL summary for human handoff.

enforcement.description: Enforcement configuration for task metadata fields. Controls validation and warning behavior for size, acceptance criteria, and auto-extraction features.

requireOnCreate.description: Require size field on task creation. When true, tasks cannot be created without specifying size.

warnMissing.description: Warn when size is not specified during task creation.

defaultValue.description: Default size value when not specified. Null means no default (field remains unset).

mode.description: Enforcement mode: off=no enforcement, warn=warn when missing, block=require on creation.

requiredForPriorities.description: Priority levels that require acceptance criteria when mode is 'warn' or 'block'.

minimumCriteria.description: Minimum number of acceptance criteria required.

requiredForMutate.description: Require an active session for task operations.

bindTasksToStage.description: Automatically bind tasks to RCASD-IVTR+C pipeline stages.

autoSetImplemented.description: Automatically set verification.gates.implemented = true when task is completed.

gitCheckpoint.description: Automatic git checkpointing of .cleo/ state files at semantic boundaries. Opt-in feature that commits state files (todo.json, sessions.json, etc.) to git history with debounce to prevent commit noise.

enabled.description: Enable automatic git checkpointing of state files. Opt-in (default: false).

debounceMinutes.description: Minimum minutes between auto-checkpoints. Set to 0 for every trigger. Does not apply to manual or session-end checkpoints.

noVerify.description: Skip pre-commit hooks on checkpoint commits (--no-verify). Recommended to avoid interference from project hooks.

lifecycleEnforcement.description: Lifecycle gate enforcement configuration. Controls how strictly the RCSD→IVTR pipeline progression is enforced.

mode.description: Enforcement mode: strict (blocks spawn if prerequisites not met), advisory (warns but allows spawn), off (disables gate checks).

contributor.description: Contributor/dev-mode settings. Auto-populated when CLEO detects it is running inside its own source repository (ADR-016 §2.3, ADR-029).

isContributorProject.description: True when this project IS the CLEO source repository. Detected automatically by fingerprinting src/mcp/, src/dispatch/, src/core/ and package.json#name. When true, agents MUST use cleo-dev CLI and local MCP server instead of production @cleocode/cleo@latest.

devCli.description: The CLI command for the local dev build (ADR-016 §2.3). Injected into agent context when isContributorProject is true.
